claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A named nav contains lists of safe real anchors; disabled destinations are non-link spans and one current destination uses aria-current=page.

interaction.keyboard: Native links and the optional native details summary remain in document order.
interaction.touch: Every primary destination meets the preferred target and safe-area inset remains visible.
interaction.routing: onNavigate is cancellable and framework navigation remains consumer-owned.

enhancementIsolation.overflowFalse: No details, nested overflow list, overflow labels, attributes, or overflow handler path exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Canvas, CanvasText, and Highlight preserve focus and current state.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Consumers own destination priority and must not hide functionality that has no other mobile path.
